naming.reason: All code uses player_character_data consistently. rewards_engine.py function signatures use player_data as param name (OK - it's a local var), but all actual game_state dict access uses player_character_data.

error_handling.reason: _extract_xp_robust handles None, empty dict, and None XP values gracefully. _has_level_up_ui_signal handles missing custom_campaign_state with isinstance check.

type_safety.reason: TypedDict usage present in custom_types.py. rewards_engine.py uses type hints (dict | None, Any, int). No untyped Any abuse in critical paths.

test_coverage.reason: 9 tests covering all PRM steps: stuck detection (2), synthesis (2), field consistency (3), integration (2). All 9 GREEN. TDD followed.

documentation.reason: Module docstring explains dependency direction. _has_level_up_ui_signal has inline comment explaining stuck completion detection. But some functions lack WHY docstrings.

evidence_standards.reason: Test log exists, score JSON exists, report markdown exists. All run artifacts committed.

prm_identified_c9_detail: PRM correctly identified that the C9 root cause (player_data vs player_character_data) is NOT the primary bug - the PRIMARY bug is the missing stuck-completion detection in _has_level_up_ui_signal. The C9 field name issue (player_data as function parameter) is benign (local variable, not dict key access).

steps.verdict: CORRECT - detects level_up_complete=True with missing rewards_box
CORRECT - calls ensure_level_up_rewards_box to synthesize missing box + planning
CORRECT - all dict key access uses player_character_data, not player_data

steps.description: Integration: end-to-end stuck completion → synthesized box + planning
steps.verdict: CORRECT - full path verified with 9 passing tests

comparison_with_actual_pr.actual_pr_fix: PR #6275 fix: (1) _has_level_up_ui_signal detects stuck completion (lines 2061-2072), (2) _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair synthesizes box + planning (lines 2089-2129), (3) ensure_level_up_rewards_box in world_logic.py builds the box
comparison_with_actual_pr.prm_test_verdict: PRM correctly verified the actual PR #6275 fix. All 9 tests pass.
comparison_with_actual_pr.c9_detail: C9 (player_data vs player_character_data) was described in the bug report but the actual occurrences are benign: function parameters named player_data are local variables that receive correctly-keyed dicts. The only real fix needed was the stuck-completion logic in _has_level_up_ui_signal.
